text_block_list.name: Aston Machan
text_block_list.text:
Oh, such a great shot! That's why you're the Chan
Chan Crew's number one cuteness photographer.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Ehe! ♪ I'm honored. This was a special shot for
your birthday pic, so I didn't hold back!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Hey, we should post this to Umasta right away!
Then everyone can join in the Machan
celebration. ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Hey, after this, we should go on a trip to buy a
cake for tonight's birthday live stream!

text_block_list.name: Aston Machan
text_block_list.text:
Invoking my authority as today's star—I move
that the cake have tons of fruit bobbing on waves
of whipped cream.

text_block_list.name: !Please Fill
text_block_list.text: The Chan Chan Crew are on the move! ♪
